# Chapter 10: Bioreactors and biomanufacturing  (~100 pp)
- 10.1 Bioreactor types (12) · 10.2 Mass and heat balances in bioreactors (15) · 10.3 Aeration, mixing, scale-up (15) · 10.4 Sterile process design (12) · 10.5 Cell-culture vs microbial vs plant systems (15) · 10.6 Downstream processing (12) · 10.7 Worked example: insulin manufacture (10) · 10.8 Failure section: contamination, scale-up loss, batch failures (9)

**Archetype**: balance, transport, scaling. **Project**: ferment a small batch (yogurt, sauerkraut); document mass balance. **Exercises**: 25.
